It took me an entire drag path to find a high quality file for this music

wiki.summary: Bonus track included in Breach: Digital Remains, a limited digital-only edition of the album released on September 12, 2025 and available for purchase only until September 19. The title "Drag Path" had been spotted on multiple occasions including on the booklet from the original Clancy: Digital Remains in the form of handwritten lyrics. In late October 2025, the song went viral due to a TikTok edit where the song plays over footage of a pufferfish dragging itself on sand to create elaborate patterns as part of its mating ritual. Read more on Last.fm.
wiki.content: Bonus track included in Breach: Digital Remains, a limited digital-only edition of the album released on September 12, 2025 and available for purchase only until September 19. The title "Drag Path" had been spotted on multiple occasions including on the booklet from the original Clancy: Digital Remains in the form of handwritten lyrics. In late October 2025, the song went viral due to a TikTok edit where the song plays over footage of a pufferfish dragging itself on sand to create elaborate patterns as part of its mating ritual. The video is edited to the song's chorus where the most relevant lyrics are found. After much demand, the track saw a wide release on February 17, 2026, with an official music video arriving on the band's YouTube page, as well as being released as a single on streaming platforms. Notably, this version of Drag Path is different from Breach: Digital Remains, with different instrumentation in its first minute, and a shorter runtime which does not contain the same final verse present on Digital Remains. Read more on Last.fm. User-contributed text is available under the Creative Commons By-SA License; additional terms may apply.
